args.query: SELECT Id, TRIM(Name) AS Name FROM Product2 WHERE Id LIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, TRIM(Name) AS Name FROM Product2 WHERE Id LIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%';

result.preview: [{"id": "#500Wt00000DDxnbIAD", "subject": "ROI Metrics Clarification  ", "status": "Closed", "createddate": "2021-01-25T09:30:00.000+0000", "description": "I am experiencing difficulty aligning the performance metrics provided by SecureAnalytics Pro with our expected ROI, and need assistance to reconcile these discrepancies."}, {"id": "500Wt00000DDy8bIAD", "subject": "Update Alerts Absent", "status": "Closed", "createddate": "2020-11-05T08:19:00.000+0000", "description": "The system does not alert me to the new features added to SecureAnalytics Pro, leading to underutilization of its updates as I'm unaware of them."}, {"id": "500Wt00000DE00gIAD", "subject": "SecureAnalytics Compliance Concern", "status": "Waiting on Customer", "createddate": "2020-09-29T01:59:00.000+0000", "description": "I need clarification on SecureAnalytics Pro's adherence to security compliance standards."}, {"id": "500Wt00000DE0AMIA1", "subject": "No Feature Update Notices", "status": "Closed", "createddate": "2021-03-07T11:25:00.000+0000", "description": "I am consistently not getting notified about feature updates for SecureAnalytics Pro, which means I am unable to take advantage of improvements and enhancements."}, {"id": "500Wt00000DE0NFIA1", "subject": "Missing Feature Notifications", "status": "Closed", "createddate": "2020-11-09T19:02:00.000+0000", "description": "I have not been receiving notifications about new features in SecureAnalytics Pro, causing me to miss out on utilizing the full capabilities of the platform."}]

args.query: SELECT id, subject, TRIM(status) AS status, createddate, TRIM(description) AS description FROM "Case" WHERE description LIKE '%SecureAnalytics Pro%' AND createddate >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate < '2021-04-10';

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, subject, TRIM(status) AS status, createddate, TRIM(description) AS description FROM "Case" WHERE description LIKE '%SecureAnalytics Pro%' AND createddate >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate < '2021-04-10';

args.query: SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id IN (SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE Id LIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%');

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id FROM OrderItem WHERE Product2Id IN (SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE Id LIKE '%01tWt000006hVJdIAM%');

args.query:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM createddate::timestamp) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM createddate::timestamp) AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM orderitemid__c) IN ('802Wt00000797awIAA','802Wt00000798VPIAY','802Wt00000799o1IAA','802Wt0000079A2bIAE','802Wt0000079ACGIA2','802Wt0000079B6gIAE')
  AND createddate >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate < '2021-04-10'
GROUP BY year, month
ORDER BY year, month;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM createddate::timestamp) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM createddate::timestamp) AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM orderitemid__c) IN ('802Wt00000797awIAA','802Wt00000798VPIAY','802Wt00000799o1IAA','802Wt0000079A2bIAE','802Wt0000079ACGIA2','802Wt0000079B6gIAE')
  AND createddate >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate < '2021-04-10'
GROUP BY year, month
ORDER BY year, month;
